title: MemoryTransferEnvelopePartial
description: A partial ICA memory transfer envelope. Carries a declared subset of memory components — either the State Document alone, the Ground Truth Network alone, or any explicit combination. Receivers MUST check transfer_scope to know which fields are guaranteed present. The envelope_hash and all integrity hashes apply to present fields only. All fields present MUST still pass the same hash verification rules as the full envelope.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier. Receivers must reject envelopes with an unsupported version.

schema_uri.description: Canonical URI of this partial envelope schema. Allows a receiver to self-validate without prior knowledge.

transfer_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this transfer event.

transfer_type.description: Always 'partial' for this schema. Receivers MUST reject this envelope if transfer_type is not 'partial'.

transfer_scope.description: Machine-readable declaration of which memory components are included in this envelope. Receivers MUST read this field before attempting to access any optional memory field. Using a declared scope absent from this list is a protocol error.

partial_of.description: Optional. If this partial envelope was split from a full envelope, the transfer_id of the originating full envelope. Enables reconstruction audit trails when memory is transferred in chunks.

chunk_sequence.description: Optional. Present when a single full envelope has been split into multiple sequential partial envelopes for chunked transfer (e.g., large Ground Truth Networks). Receivers use this to order and reassemble partial envelopes.

sender_agent_id.description: Identity of the agent instance that produced this envelope.

receiver_agent_id.description: Optional. Intended recipient agent identity. If present, the receiver SHOULD verify its identity matches before accepting.

conversation_id.description: Identifier of the conversation whose partial memory state is being transferred.

state_document_json.description: Conditionally required. Present only when transfer_scope includes 'state_document'. The full ICA State Document serialised as a JSON string. Must be absent if 'state_document' is not in transfer_scope.

state_document_hash.description: Conditionally required. Present and MUST be verified when transfer_scope includes 'state_document'. SHA-256 hex digest of state_document_json.

state_document_version_index.description: Conditionally present. When transfer_scope includes 'state_document', this is the version_index of the transferred State Document snapshot within the full chain. Allows receivers to know the relative position of this snapshot without receiving the full chain.

state_chain_hashes.description: Conditionally present. When transfer_scope includes 'state_chain', carries the full or partial State Document version chain. May be a subset — state_chain_range declares which portion is included.

state_chain_range.description: Optional. When state_chain_hashes is present but does not cover the full version history, this declares which version range is included. Absent means the full chain from genesis to current is included.

ground_truth_network.description: Conditionally required. Present only when transfer_scope includes 'ground_truth_network'. May be a node-filtered subset — see node_filter.

node_filter.description: Optional. When ground_truth_network is present and contains a subset of all nodes (e.g., only active-tier nodes), this describes the filter criteria applied. Enables receivers to understand the completeness of the transferred graph.

node_attestations.description: Conditionally required. Present when transfer_scope includes 'ground_truth_network'. Contains attestations for exactly the nodes present in ground_truth_network.nodes — not the full conversation graph.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which the sender produced this envelope.

expires_at.description: Optional. ISO 8601 timestamp after which this envelope MUST NOT be accepted.

envelope_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical partial envelope. Computed identically to the full envelope: JSON-serialise with envelope_hash set to empty string, sort keys lexicographically, hash UTF-8 bytes. Receivers MUST verify before any other processing.

signature.description: Optional. Cryptographic signature over the envelope_hash. Same semantics as in the full envelope schema.

encoding.description: Optional. Character encoding of string fields.

metadata.description: Optional. Extensibility bag. Included in envelope_hash computation.

allOf.description: If transfer_scope includes 'state_document', then state_document_json and state_document_hash MUST be present.
If transfer_scope includes 'state_chain', then state_chain_hashes MUST be present.
If transfer_scope includes 'ground_truth_network', then ground_truth_network and node_attestations MUST be present.

TransferScope.description: Declares which ICA memory components are included in this partial envelope.

includes.description: List of memory component identifiers present in this envelope. Must be non-empty — a partial envelope with nothing included is invalid. 'state_document' = current State Document snapshot. 'state_chain' = State Document version chain. 'ground_truth_network' = conversation graph nodes and edges.

reason.description: Optional. Human-readable explanation for why this subset was chosen (e.g., 'state_document only — GTN too large for this transport'). Informational only.

ChunkSequence.description: Chunked transfer sequencing information. Present when a full envelope has been split into ordered parts.

batch_id.description: Shared identifier across all chunks of the same split. Receivers use this to group and order chunks.

chunk_index.description: Zero-based index of this chunk within the batch.

total_chunks.description: Total number of chunks in this batch. Receivers assemble all chunks before processing.

StateChainEntry.description: A single entry in the State Document version chain.

version_index.description: Zero-based sequential version number. Must be strictly monotonically increasing within the array.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the State Document at this version.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this version was committed.

summary.description: Optional. Human-readable changelog entry for this version.

StateChainRange.description: Declares which portion of the full State Document version chain is included in state_chain_hashes.

from_version_index.description: version_index of the first entry in state_chain_hashes.

to_version_index.description: version_index of the last entry in state_chain_hashes.

total_versions.description: Total number of versions in the complete chain (including versions not transferred). Allows receivers to understand what fraction of the chain they received.

GroundTruthNetwork.description: A subset of the ICA conversation graph. May be filtered by tier, node list, or other criteria — see node_filter.

network_id.description: Stable identifier for the full Ground Truth Network. Identical across all partial envelopes that carry subsets of the same network.

network_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of THIS subset (not the full network). Computed over the nodes and edges present in this transfer, sorted by ID.

full_network_hash.description: Optional. SHA-256 hash of the complete network from which this subset was drawn. Allows receivers to verify that this subset is consistent with a known full network hash.

tier.description: Optional. If all nodes share a single tier, declare it here.

edges.description: Typed edges between the transferred nodes. MUST NOT reference node_ids absent from this transfer's nodes array.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this network subset was snapshotted.

total_node_count.description: Optional. Total node count in the full network. Lets the receiver gauge completeness of this transfer.

transferred_node_count.description: Optional. Number of nodes in this partial transfer. Should match nodes.length.

GraphNode.description: A single node in the ICA conversation graph.

GraphEdge.description: A typed directed edge between two graph nodes.

NodeAttestations.description: Map of node_id → SHA-256 hex for nodes present in this transfer.

NodeFilter.description: Describes which nodes were excluded and why, so receivers can understand the completeness of the transferred Ground Truth Network.

tier_filter.description: If non-empty, only nodes from the listed tiers were included.

max_nodes.description: If set, the transfer was limited to this many nodes (selected by recency or score).

node_ids.description: If set, only the listed node_ids were transferred (allowlist).

excluded_node_ids.description: If set, these node_ids were explicitly excluded from the transfer.

reason.description: Optional. Human-readable reason for this filter (e.g., 'active-tier only for low-latency handoff').

EnvelopeMetadata.description: Open extension bag. Always included in envelope_hash computation.
